docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY ANDERSON PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE WEYMAN LEE SUSIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $380.00 FILED BY LEE WEYMAN LEE SUSIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ANDERSON PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE WEYMAN LEE SUSIE $113.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $121.00, THIS JUDGMENT CONTMPLATES THAT THE CHECK FOR $787. DELIVERED TO PLFT IN OPEN COURT CLEARS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEE WEYMAN LEE SUSIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ANDERSON PATRICIA DEFENDANT TAKES NOTHING ON CROSS-COMPLAINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
